title: nordenstamia tovarii
intro: Nordenstamia tovarii, also known as Tovar's Nordenstamia, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a flowering plant native to Peru and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and stems have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help with wound healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Nordenstamia tovarii include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin problems and infections.
